mapper.insert: insert into tb_todo_tag (create_time, update_time, todo_id, tag_id) values (#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{todoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tagId,jdbcType=BIGINT})

update tb_todo_tag
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
todo_id = #{todoId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
tag_id = #{tagId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

insert into tb_todo_tag (create_time, update_time, todo_id, tag_id) values
(#{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.todoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.tagId,jdbcType=BIGINT})

(#{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.todoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.tagId,jdbcType=BIGINT})
on duplicate key update create_time=values(create_time), update_time=values(update_time), todo_id=values(todo_id), tag_id=values(tag_id)
